stations.name: Closest station is Windsor
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable for parts of Red Hill.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Red Hill via Musgrave Road and Waterworks Road.

driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 9 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Musgrave Road has a small village strip with cafes and casual dining. Paddington's Latrobe Terrace and Newmarket are within a short drive.
lifestyle.topography_note: Red Hill is named for its topography. Many streets sit on slopes and ridges.

pockets.name: Hilltop / view streets
pockets.character: Elevated streets with city outlooks. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Musgrave Road precinct
pockets.character: Streets close to the village strip and Inner City Bypass.

buyer_profile.note: Character home stock attracts buyers looking for renovation projects.
Kelvin Grove State College catchment is a buyer driver.
